176134.name: Annual CO2 emissions per unit energy (kg per kilowatt-hour)
176134.description: Annual production-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2), measured in kilograms per kilowatt-hour of primary energy consumption. Production-based emissions are based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods.

display.name: Carbon intensity: annual CO₂ emissions per unit energy

176134.datasetName: Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020)
176134.s_name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project, BP and Shift Energy Data Portal

source.name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project, BP and Shift Energy Data Portal
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project, BP and Shift Energy Data Portal
source.dataPublisherSource: Friedlingstein et al. (2020), BP and Shift Energy Data Portal
source.additionalInfo:
The Global Carbon Budget dataset is available at https://folk.universitetetioslo.no/roberan/GCB2020.shtml (1750-2019) and https://doi.org/10.18160/GCP-2020 (1959-2019).

Full reference for the Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020) dataset: Friedlingstein et al, Global Carbon Budget 2020, Earth Syst. Sci. Data, 12, 3269–3340, https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-12-3269-2020, 2020.

Our World in Data have renamed the category "bunker fuels" as "International transport" for improved clarity, which includes emissions from international aviation and shipping.

Primary energy consumption figures are sourced from BP and Shift Energy Data Portal. Link: https://www.bp.com/en/global/corporate/energy-economics/statistical-review-of-world-energy, https://www.theshiftdataportal.org/energy
